name: VTIL_SaveAsImage
title: VTIL_SaveAsImage
syntax: long VTIL_SaveAsImage(dbNode workingSetMaster, dword maskOrSoftkey, char imagePath[]); // form 1
description: Saves the current Data/Alarm Mask or one of the current Soft Keys as an image. An existing file is overwritten.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
